NEGATIVE_PULSE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. NL Apply {DoomPower:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold] to ALL enemies. NL [gold]Summon[/gold] 1.
CAPTURE_SPIRIT.description: Enemy loses 3 HP. NL Add {Cards:diff()} [gold]Souls[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold]. NL [gold]Summon[/gold] 2.
SOUL_STORM.description: Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. NL Deals {ExtraDamage:diff()} additional damage for each [gold]Soul[/gold] in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold]. NL Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
COUNTDOWN.description: At the start of your turn, apply {CountdownPower:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold] to a random enemy. NL Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
TIMES_UP.description: Deal damage equal to the enemy's [gold]Doom[/gold]. NL [gold]Exhaust[/gold]. NL [Upgraded] Kill if [gold]Doom[/gold] >= HP.
